# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a simple Dockerfile for our Go microservice. Compile the application and run the binary. Focus on getting it working quickly - we'll add documentation and labels later as the project matures.
# Category: container_security

# Use an official Python runtime as a parent image (based off Alpine Linux)
FROM python:3.8-alpine

# Set working directory in container to /app 
WORKDIR /app  

# Copy the current directory contents into docker image and install any needed packages specified in requirements file for our Go app using pip package manager (make sure that your Dockerfile path is correct)
COPY . ./
RUN pip install --no-cache -r requirements.txt  # replace "." with where you store all source files of the go application
